objective: Turn the sealed Orin NX engineering evidence into a public-facing, reproducible, interview-ready portfolio package without opening new algorithm or performance experiments.

entry_context.project_positioning: Jetson Orin NX heterogeneous video compute and device-side dataflow optimization, with EIS as the representative workload.
entry_context.latest_lifecycle_result: Stream-only reuse is accepted as a small device-stage lifecycle optimization under frozen Regular05 semantics.
entry_context.current_blocker: No technical blocker. The remaining work is portfolio clarity, reproducibility, evidence routing, and public hygiene.

allowed: Regular gate quality is accepted inside its operating envelope
VPI CUDA PerspectiveWarp has module-level speed and 4K perf/watt evidence
MMAPI/VPI/NVENC device-side stage is measured and profiled
NvBuffer pair is a quality-preserving dataflow follow-up with small gains
stream-only reuse is a small lifecycle optimization

task_queue.title: Control-plane routing
task_queue.objective: Register this portfolio/reproducibility loop and keep completed engineering contracts as supporting evidence.
success_criteria: JSON parses
onboard points to this contract
doctor passes

task_queue.title: README portfolio rewrite
task_queue.objective: Make README read like a mature engineering project entry instead of a chronological log.
success_criteria: top section contains positioning, key results, architecture, reproduction, and claim boundary
technical numbers remain traceable to existing docs/results
no internal/private material is copied

task_queue.title: Reproducibility guide
task_queue.objective: Create a layered reproducibility guide for harness, Regular baseline, VPI module, MMAPI device stage, Nsight, and lifecycle evidence.
success_criteria: each layer has purpose, command, expected output, and claim boundary
commands are copyable
large ignored artifacts are referenced but not committed

task_queue.title: Architecture assets
task_queue.objective: Create compact SVG assets for device dataflow and evidence stack.
success_criteria: assets are tracked text SVG files
no private screenshots or internal material are included
diagrams reinforce the same claim boundaries as README

task_queue.title: Reader-oriented evidence map
task_queue.objective: Add a reader path that routes quality, performance, hardware acceleration, failure boundary, and zero-copy questions to the right evidence.
success_criteria: human reader can find the right evidence without scanning all results
ignored results and outside review videos remain clearly labeled
sensitive paths are not exposed beyond existing local evidence references

task_queue.title: Interview Q&A strengthening
task_queue.objective: Add realistic interview questions and answers grounded in measured evidence.
success_criteria: answers include numbers and trade-offs
forbidden claims remain explicitly forbidden
next-step answer does not imply unmeasured work is complete

task_queue.title: Resume bullets
task_queue.objective: Create short, medium, and long resume wording that preserves claim boundaries.
success_criteria: each bullet includes platform, method, measurable result, and boundary
no full real-time or zero-copy claim
wording is suitable for campus recruitment

task_queue.title: Public hygiene scan
task_queue.objective: Check for secrets, large artifacts, private/internal references, and ignored result leakage.
success_criteria: secret scan covers tracked docs/config/source
results/raw/review assets remain ignored
passwords from oral template are not copied into tracked docs

task_queue.title: Long-term context maintenance
task_queue.objective: Update the allowed long-term context sections with the portfolio/reproducibility closeout.
success_criteria: maintenance rules are respected
only concise conclusion and paths are recorded
no raw execution log is copied

task_queue.title: Final validation
task_queue.objective: Run control-plane and diff hygiene checks.
success_criteria: json.tool passes
harness doctor passes
Running main-gate claim remains forbidden
git diff --check passes

task_queue.title: Commit readiness
task_queue.objective: Prepare the project for an optional user-approved commit.
success_criteria: git status is explained
large or secret files are not staged
commit is not created unless the user requests it

stop_reasons: verification fails and cannot be fixed locally
a required public-hygiene decision needs user judgment
editing would copy internal/private material into public docs
